Sp1: J_mu^a=i Phi^dagger T^a <->D_mu Phi times the derived profile overlap
U1: J_mu^(q)=q Phi^dagger <->D_mu Phi with q=2m when the nested component is independently retained
canonical_coefficient: requires g4_geom from an action-supported common profile
claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.
conservation: covariant after a common self-adjoint gauge/matter boundary domain closes
